sentences.target: Das Personal ist heute sehr freundlich.

translations.de: Das Personal ist heute sehr freundlich.
translations.en: The staff are very friendly today.
translations.es: El personal está muy amable hoy.
translations.fr: Le personnel est très aimable aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Il personale oggi è molto gentile.
translations.pt: O pessoal está muito simpático hoje.
translations.vi: Nhân viên hôm nay rất thân thiện.
translations.nl: Het personeel is vandaag erg vriendelijk.
translations.el: Σήμερα το προσωπικό είναι πολύ φιλικό.
translations.nb: De ansatte er veldig hyggelige i dag.
translations.da: De ansatte er meget venlige i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はスタッフがとても親切です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative neuter singular, determiner of 'Personal' as the subject NP.
Collective/mass noun, neuter; head of the subject NP in nominative; refers to the employees as a group.
Copular auxiliary, present 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicative adjective.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; sets the time frame to 'today'.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'freundlich'.
Predicative adjective (predicate complement of the copula); describes the subject's property.

translations.es: Hoy el café tiene poco personal.
translations.fr: Le café manque de personnel aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi al caffè c’è poco personale.
translations.ru: Сегодня в кафе не хватает персонала.
translations.pt: Hoje o café está com pouco pessoal.
translations.vi: Hôm nay quán cà phê thiếu nhân viên.
translations.ar: المقهى اليوم يعاني من نقص في الموظفين.
translations.hu: Ma a kávézóban kevés a személyzet.
translations.hi: आज कैफ़े में स्टाफ़ कम है.
translations.el: Σήμερα στο καφέ υπάρχει έλλειψη προσωπικού.
translations.ro: Astăzi la cafenea nu sunt destui angajați.
translations.cs: Dnes je v kavárně málo personálu.
translations.fi: Kahvilassa on tänään liian vähän henkilökuntaa.
translations.ja: 今日はカフェは人手が足りないです。

tokens.explanation: Preposition 'in' fused with the definite article 'dem'; introduces a locative PP and governs dative.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'im' in dative; denotes the location.
Finite lexical verb, present 3rd person singular; intransitive 'to be lacking'; Verb-second after the initial PP.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates the time.
Subject in nominative (the thing that is lacking); collective/mass noun, neuter.

sentences.target: Ich spreche kurz mit dem Personal.

translations.de: Ich spreche kurz mit dem Personal.
translations.en: I’m talking briefly with the staff.
translations.es: Hablo un momento con el personal.
translations.fr: Je parle un instant avec le personnel.
translations.it: Parlo un attimo con il personale.
translations.zh-Hans: 我和工作人员简单聊一下。
translations.pt: Estou conversando um instante com o pessoal.
translations.vi: Tôi nói chuyện một chút với nhân viên.
translations.nl: Ik praat even met het personeel.
translations.hi: मैं स्टाफ से थोड़ी देर बात कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Μιλάω για λίγο με το προσωπικό.
translations.nb: Jeg prater litt med de ansatte.
translations.ja: スタッフと少し話しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite lexical verb, present 1st person singular; takes a PP complement with 'mit'.
Adverb of manner/duration; modifies the verb to indicate brevity.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the interlocutor as a PP complement.
Definite article, dative neuter singular; determiner of 'Personal' within the PP headed by 'mit'.
Collective/mass noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'mit' in dative; denotes the group spoken with.

sentences.target: Das Restaurant sucht dringend neues Personal.

translations.de: Das Restaurant sucht dringend neues Personal.
translations.en: The restaurant is urgently looking for new staff.
translations.es: El restaurante busca urgentemente nuevo personal.
translations.fr: Le restaurant cherche d’urgence du nouveau personnel.
translations.it: Il ristorante cerca urgentemente nuovo personale.
translations.ko: 레스토랑이 급히 새로운 직원을 구하고 있어요.
translations.pt: O restaurante está procurando novos funcionários com urgência.
translations.vi: Nhà hàng đang cần tuyển gấp nhân viên mới.
translations.ar: المطعم يبحث بشكل عاجل عن موظفين جدد.
translations.nl: Het restaurant zoekt met spoed nieuw personeel.
translations.hu: Az étterem sürgősen új munkatársakat keres.
translations.hi: रेस्तरां तुरंत नए स्टाफ की तलाश कर रहा है.
translations.el: Το εστιατόριο αναζητά άμεσα νέο προσωπικό.
translations.id: Restoran sedang mencari staf baru secepatnya.
translations.ro: Restaurantul caută de urgență personal nou.
translations.ja: レストランは新しいスタッフを至急募集しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative neuter singular; determiner of the subject noun 'Restaurant'.
Common noun, neuter; head of the subject NP in nominative.
Finite lexical verb, present 3rd person singular; transitive, takes 'Personal' as direct object.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb to indicate urgency.
Attributive adjective, accusative neuter singular (strong inflection, no article); modifies 'Personal'.
Collective/mass noun, neuter; direct object in accusative of 'sucht'.
